title: Add 'MOD x RDX' branding text and update UI color to #7B2EFF

requirements.text: Add 'MOD x RDX' text in bold sans-serif font next to the icon.png logo on the left side of the main page in frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx, ensuring the text and logo are horizontally aligned

quotes: Please add the text "MOD x RDX" in **bold sans-serif font**: - Next to the MOD x RDX logo on the **left side of the main page**

acceptanceCriteria: The text 'MOD x RDX' appears next to the circular logo on the homepage
The text uses a bold sans-serif font family
The text and logo are horizontally aligned
The layout remains responsive on all screen sizes

requirements.text: Add 'MOD x RDX' text in bold sans-serif font next to the icon.png logo in the mobile sheet menu navigation in frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx, ensuring the text and logo are horizontally aligned

quotes: Please add the text "MOD x RDX" in **bold sans-serif font**: - Next to the MOD x RDX logo in the **three-dot menu**

acceptanceCriteria: The text 'MOD x RDX' appears next to the circular logo in the mobile sheet menu
The text uses a bold sans-serif font family
The text and logo are horizontally aligned within the mobile menu
The mobile menu layout remains clean and functional

requirements.text: Update the website background and UI color scheme throughout all pages in frontend/src/index.css to use the hex color #7B2EFF by modifying the root CSS variables for both light and dark modes

quotes: Also, please set the website background/UI color live using this hex code: #7B2EFF

acceptanceCriteria: The background color uses #7B2EFF throughout the site
The color scheme is consistent across all pages
Both light and dark mode configurations use the #7B2EFF color appropriately
Text remains readable against the new background color
The color applies to relevant UI elements (background, cards, borders, etc.)

constraints: Keep the existing icon.png logo unchanged
Preserve all existing functionality and features
Maintain responsive design for all screen sizes
nonGoals: Modifying post creation or display functionality
